login.title: Borg Web UI
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your backups
login.successChangePassword: Login successful! Please change your password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Comprehensive overview of your backup infrastructure
dashboard.noRepositories: No repositories configured yet. Create your first repository to start backing up!

backup.title: Backup Operations
backup.subtitle: Manage and monitor your backup jobs

manualBackup.title: Manual Backup
manualBackup.subtitle: Select a repository and start a backup job
manualBackup.observeOnlyHidden: Some repositories are hidden because they are configured for observability only.

noRepositories.title: No Repositories Found
noRepositories.subtitle: Create a repository in the Repositories page before starting a backup

archives.title: Archive Browser
archives.subtitle: Browse and manage your backup archives
archives.noRepositories: No repositories found. Create a repository first.
archives.selectRepository: Select a repository to view its archives
archives.deletionStarted: Archive deletion started in background (Job ID: {{id}})
archives.mountTimeout: Mount timeout: Large repositories may need more time to mount.
archives.restoreStarted: Restore job started! Check the Activity tab to monitor progress.

restore.title: Restore Archives
restore.subtitle: Select an archive to restore from backup
restore.selectArchive: Select an archive below to restore its contents. The entire archive will be restored to the destination path you specify.
restore.noArchives: No archives found in this repository

dialog.title: Restore Archive
dialog.fullRestoreWarning: This will restore the entire archive to the destination path. Existing files may be overwritten.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Manage automated backups and repository checks
schedule.noRepositories: You need to create at least one repository before scheduling backups.

repositories.title: Repository Management
repositories.subtitle: A repository is where your backed-up data will be stored. The files from your configured sources will be backed up here.

empty.title: No Repositories Yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first Borg repository to start backing up your data.
empty.hint: Create a local repository or remote repository via SSH.

noMatch.title: No Matching Repositories
noMatch.message: No repositories match "{{search}}". Try a different search term.

activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: View all operations and their logs

empty.title: No activity found
empty.message: There are no operations matching your filters

password.title: Change Password
password.subtitle: Update your password to keep your account secure

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Customize the look and feel of the application

deleteDialog.title: Delete User
deleteDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete the user {{username}}?

sshConnections.title: Remote Machines
sshConnections.subtitle: Manage remote machines with storage monitoring and logical mount points

singleKeySystem.title: Single-Key System
singleKeySystem.description: This system uses one SSH key for all remote connections. Generate the system key once, then deploy it to as many remote servers as needed.

systemKey.title: System SSH Key
systemKey.noKey: No system SSH key found. Generate a new one or import an existing one.

deployDialog.title: Deploy SSH Key to Server
deployDialog.sftpMode: Use SFTP mode for key deployment

instructions.title: Before adding this connection:
instructions.step1: Copy the public key from above

deleteKeyDialog.title: Delete System SSH Key
deleteKeyDialog.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this SSH key?
deleteKeyDialog.warning1: Remove the SSH key from database and filesystem

scripts.title: Script Library
scripts.subtitle: Reusable scripts for backup hooks and maintenance
scripts.empty: No scripts created yet. Scripts can be assigned to repositories for pre-backup and post-backup hooks.

runOn.warning: Warning - Only after backups with warnings
runOn.note: Note: The 'Run On' condition only applies to Post-Backup hooks.

fields.name: Name
fields.parametersHint: Check the box for parameters that contain sensitive data.

scripts.usedInPlaces: This script is used in {{count}} place(s). Changes will affect all assignments.

testDialog.title: Test Script
testDialog.hasParams: This script has parameters. Provide values below to test.
testDialog.noParams: This script has no parameters. Click 'Run Test' to execute it.

warnings.removeRecord: This will remove the job record from the system
warnings.noAffect: This will NOT affect any actual backup data

deleteArchive.title: Delete Archive?
deleteArchive.subtitle: Are you sure you want to delete this archive?
deleteArchive.warning: This action cannot be undone. The archive data will be permanently removed from the repository.

deleteSchedule.title: Delete Schedule?
deleteSchedule.message: Are you sure you want to delete this schedule?

cancelJob.title: Cancel Job?
cancelJob.message: Are you sure you want to cancel this job?

checkWarning.title: Repository Check
checkWarning.message: Running a full repository check can take a long time for large repositories.

compactWarning.title: Compact Repository
compactWarning.message: Compacting the repository will free up space but may take some time.

lockError.title: Repository Locked
lockError.message: The repository is currently locked. This may be due to an interrupted operation.

repositoryInfo.title: Repository Information
repositoryInfo.noBackupsDesc: This repository has been initialized but contains no archives. Storage statistics will appear here after you create your first backup.
repositoryInfo.loadFailed: Failed to load repository information. Make sure the repository is accessible and properly initialized.

notifications.title: Notification Services
notifications.subtitle: Configure notification services for backup and restore alerts
notifications.noServicesSubtitle: Add your first notification service to get alerts about backup failures and other important events.
notifications.testSentSuccessfully: Test notification sent successfully! Check your service.
notifications.nameAndUrlRequired: Name and Service URL are required

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Customize your experience and manage your privacy settings
preferences.analyticsDescription: Help us improve Borg UI by sharing anonymous usage data. We collect page views, feature clicks, and browser type—without tracking IP addresses, hostnames, cookies, or any personally identifiable information.

betaFeatures.title: Beta Features
betaFeatures.subtitle: Enable experimental features (may be unstable)
betaFeatures.description: Try experimental features before they're released to everyone. These features are still in development and may change.

export.title: Export Configuration
export.subtitle: Download your current configuration
export.description: Export your repositories, backup schedules, and settings to a borgmatic-compatible YAML file.

import.title: Import Configuration
import.subtitle: Restore configuration from a file
import.description: Import borgmatic YAML configurations or Borg UI exports. Supports both standard borgmatic format and Borg UI exports.

mountsManagement.title: Active Mounts
mountsManagement.subtitle: Manage mounted Borg archives. Archives are automatically unmounted on container restart.

analyticsConsent.title: Help Improve Borg UI
analyticsConsent.message: We collect anonymous usage data to understand how Borg UI is used and make it better. No personal information, IP addresses, hostnames, or backup data is ever collected.
analyticsConsent.viewDashboardSuffix: to see exactly what we collect.
analyticsConsent.changeAnytime: You can change this anytime in Settings → Preferences

runningBackups.title: Running Backups
runningBackups.realtimeProgress: Real-time progress for scheduled backup jobs

scheduledChecks.title: Scheduled Checks
scheduledChecks.maxDurationHint: Time limit for check operation (3600 = 1 hour)
scheduledChecks.notificationHint: Notification settings for check jobs can be configured in Settings → Notifications
scheduledChecks.noScheduledChecksDesc: Configure automatic repository checks to ensure data integrity
scheduledChecks.needRepository: You need to create at least one repository before scheduling checks.

wizard.noSshConnections: No SSH connections configured. Please configure SSH connections in the SSH Keys page first.

backupFlowPreview.localToLocal: Back up local data to local repository
backupFlowPreview.localToRemote: Back up local data to remote repository
backupFlowPreview.remoteToLocal: Back up remote data to local repository via SSHFS

backupConfig.remoteSshfsNote: Remote directories are mounted via SSHFS preserving their original paths. Exclude patterns work the same as local sources (e.g., */var/cache/*).

dataSource.title: Where is the data you want to back up?
dataSource.localDescription: Back up data from this server (local or mounted filesystems)
dataSource.removeRemoteDirsFirst: Remove remote directories first to switch
dataSource.remoteToRemoteDisabledTooltip: Remote-to-remote backups are not supported. Select a local repository or use the same remote machine.
dataSource.notAvailableRemoteRepo: Not available when repository is on a remote client
dataSource.remoteDescription: Back up data from a remote machine via SSH
dataSource.removeLocalDirsFirst: Remove local directories first to switch
dataSource.remoteToRemoteBody: When the repository is stored on a remote server, the data source must be the Borg UI server. Remote-to-remote backups are not supported.
dataSource.browseRemoteNote: Browse remote directories or enter full paths manually (e.g., /home/user/documents, /var/www)
dataSource.remoteSshNote: The Borg UI server will SSH into the remote machine to browse and back up the selected directories. Ensure the SSH connection is properly configured with the necessary permissions.

location.repositoryNameHelper: A friendly name to identify this repository
location.observabilityInfo: Observability-only repositories can browse and restore existing archives but cannot create new backups.
location.readOnlyStorageDesc: Enable if the storage is read-only or locked by another process (adds --bypass-lock)
location.borgUiServerDesc: Store backups on this server's local storage
location.remoteClientDesc: Store backups on a remote machine via SSH
location.remoteDisabledInfo: This repository is configured to back up data from a remote machine. Remote-to-remote backups (backing up from one remote machine to another) are not supported. Please keep the repository on the Borg UI Server.
location.repositoryPathHelper: Path where the repository will be stored

restoreDestination.title: Where should files be restored?
restoreDestination.subtitle: Select the destination and location for your restored files
restoreDestination.borgUiServerDesc: Restore to this server's local storage
restoreDestination.remoteMachineDesc: Restore to a remote machine via SSH
restoreDestination.sshToSshNotSupported: SSH-to-SSH restore is not supported. Only local destinations are available for SSH repositories.
restoreDestination.restoreToOriginalDescLocal: Recreate full directory structure from root (/)
restoreDestination.restoreToOriginalDescRemote: Recreate full directory structure from root (/) on the remote machine
restoreDestination.customPathHelperLocal: Choose a writable directory where files will be restored
restoreDestination.customPathHelperRemote: Choose a writable directory on the remote machine

restoreFiles.title: Select files to restore
restoreFiles.subtitle: Browse the archive and select the files or folders you want to restore
restoreFiles.noItemsFound: No items found in this directory
restoreFiles.helpText: Click files to select them, or click folders to navigate. Use the checkbox next to folders to select entire directories.

restorePath.title: Choose restore location
restorePath.subtitle: Restore files to their original paths or select a custom destination
restorePath.restoreToOriginalDesc: Recreate full directory structure from root (/)
restorePath.customPathHelper: Choose a writable directory where files will be restored
restorePath.noSshConnection: Please select an SSH connection in the previous step.

restoreReview.readyEntireArchive: Ready to restore entire archive from {{archiveName}}
restoreReview.previewNote: Preview of where your files will be restored:
restoreReview.entireArchiveNote: The entire archive will be restored with all files and directories.
restoreReview.everythingLooksGood: Everything looks good! Click "Restore Files" to begin the restore operation.

review.name: Name
review.repositoryImportNote: Repository will be verified before import. Ensure the passphrase is correct.
review.repositoryEditNote: Changes will be saved to the repository configuration.

security.repokeyDesc: Key stored in repository, protected by passphrase
security.keyfileDesc: Key stored separately, requires passphrase + keyfile
security.noneDesc: No encryption - data stored in plaintext
security.securityWarningBody: Your backup data will be stored without encryption. Anyone with access to the repository can read your files. This is not recommended for sensitive data.
security.encryptionReadonly: Encryption settings cannot be changed after repository creation.
security.passphrasePlaceholderEdit: Leave blank to keep last saved passphrase
security.passphraseHelperEdit: Optional - leave blank to keep last saved passphrase
security.passphraseHelperCreate: Keep this safe - you cannot access backups without it!
security.borgKeyfileDesc: Borg keyfiles are typically stored without a file extension in ~/.config/borg/keys/
security.keyfileUploadNote: Keyfile will be uploaded after import
security.keyfileContentNote: Keyfile content will be saved after import
security.remoteBorgPathHelper: Path to borg executable on remote (if not in PATH)

basicInfo.repositoriesHelper: Use arrows to change backup order.
basicInfo.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one repository to continue.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Options
maintenance.subtitle: Run prune and compact after backups to manage disk space.
maintenance.info: Prune removes old archives. Compact reclaims disk space.
maintenance.pruneAfterBackupDesc: Remove old archives based on retention policy
maintenance.compactAfterPruneDesc: Reclaim disk space by freeing segments
maintenance.compactInfo: Compact reclaims disk space after prune. May take time on large repositories.

config.scheduleHelper: Click the clock icon to use the visual builder.

scripts.scheduleLevelNote: Schedule-level: runs once per schedule. Repository-level: runs for each repository.
scripts.selectRepoFirst: Select at least one repository in Step 1 to configure scripts.

scheduledJobsTableSection.title: All Scheduled Jobs
scheduledJobsTableSection.noJobsDesc: Create your first scheduled backup job

advancedRepositoryOptions.title: Advanced Options
advancedRepositoryOptions.subtitle: Configure remote borg path, custom flags, and backup hooks for advanced use cases
advancedRepositoryOptions.remoteBorgPathHint: Path to borg binary on remote server (leave empty for default)
advancedRepositoryOptions.customFlagsHint: Custom command-line flags for borg create (e.g., --stats, --progress, --list)
advancedRepositoryOptions.scriptsHint: Configure inline scripts or assign reusable scripts from your Script Library.

archiveBrowser.title: Browse Archive
archiveBrowser.selectionInfo: Select specific files or folders to restore. Click folders to browse, click checkboxes to select. If no selection is made, the entire archive will be restored.
archiveBrowser.archiveTooLargeDesc: This archive contains too many files to browse safely in the UI.

archiveContents.title: Archive Contents
archiveContents.emptyArchiveDesc: No files were backed up in this archive. This may happen if the source directory was empty or inaccessible during the backup.

commandPreview.initRepositoryDesc: Creates encrypted repository at the specified location
commandPreview.mountDisplayText: Mounts remote directory under shared temp root
commandPreview.mountDisplayTextMultiple: Mounts {{count}} unique directories under shared temp root (files share parent mount)
commandPreview.archivesPreserve: Archives preserve original paths (excludes work intuitively)
commandPreview.cleanupDesc: Unmounts remote directory after backup completes
commandPreview.backupSourceDirs: Backs up source directories to the repository
commandPreview.futureBackups: This command will be used for future backups

compressionSettings.title: Compression Settings
compressionSettings.algorithmLz4: lz4 - Very high speed, very low compression (default)
compressionSettings.algorithmZlib: zlib - Medium speed, medium compression (default level 6)
compressionSettings.algorithmLzma: lzma - Low speed, high compression (default level 6)
compressionSettings.levelHelperAuto: Auto algorithm uses lz4 as fallback. Level setting not applicable.
compressionSettings.levelHelperZstd: zstd: Level 1-22. Higher = better compression but slower.
compressionSettings.levelHelperZlib: zlib: Level 0-9. Level 0 means no compression (use "none" instead).
compressionSettings.levelHelperLzma: lzma: Level 0-9. Levels above 6 are pointless and waste CPU/RAM.
compressionSettings.levelHelperDefault: Leave empty to use default level.
compressionSettings.autoDetectDesc: Uses lz4 to test if data is compressible. For incompressible data (e.g., media files), uses "none". For compressible data, uses your selected algorithm.
compressionSettings.obfuscateHelper: Obfuscate compressed chunk sizes to make fingerprinting attacks harder. Must be used with encryption. Repo will be bigger.

excludePatterns.title: Exclude Patterns (Optional)
excludePatterns.hint: Specify patterns to exclude from backup (e.g., *.log, *.tmp, __pycache__, node_modules)

multiRepositorySelector.selectedCountWithOrder: Selected repositories ({{count}}) - Use arrows to change backup order

packages.title: System Packages
packages.subtitle: Install system packages that can be used in your backup scripts. Packages are automatically reinstalled when the container is recreated.
packages.hint: Simply enter a package name (e.g., wakeonlan, curl) and it will be installed using sudo apt-get install -y. For advanced cases, you can enable custom install commands.
packages.emptyDesc: Add system packages to use in your backup scripts

fields.packageNameHintSimple: e.g., wakeonlan, curl, jq (will run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y <name>)
fields.installCommandHint: e.g., apt-get install -y wakeonlan or pip install some-package
fields.descriptionHint: Brief description of what this package does

deleteDialog.title: Delete Package
deleteDialog.message: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from the list?
deleteDialog.note: This will not uninstall the package from the system, only remove it from the list.

resultDialog.installingDesc: Installing package... This may take a few minutes.

repositoryScriptsSection.createFirst: Create the repository first to add library scripts

scriptEditor.timeoutHint: Maximum time to wait for script execution

scriptSelector.title: Schedule-Level Scripts
scriptSelector.subtitle: These scripts run once per schedule (e.g., wake server before all backups, shutdown after)
scriptSelector.preBackup: Pre-Backup Script (runs once before all backups)
scriptSelector.postBackup: Post-Backup Script (runs once after all backups)
scriptSelector.runRepoScriptsDesc: If enabled, each repository's pre/post scripts will run during its backup

sourceDirectories.title: Source Directories & Files
sourceDirectories.subtitle: Specify which directories or files to backup to this repository
sourceDirectories.warning: At least one source directory or file is required. Add the directories or files you want to backup.

terminalLogViewer.title: Backup Logs
terminalLogViewer.showingLast: Showing last 500 of {{total}} lines (errors typically appear at end)
terminalLogViewer.newLogsAvailable: New logs available - Click to scroll to bottom

fileExplorer.sshInfoAlert: SSH connections are shown below. Configure mount points in SSH Keys page for cleaner display names.

scheduledChecks.title: Scheduled Checks
scheduledChecks.maxDurationHint: Time limit for check operation (3600 = 1 hour)
scheduledChecks.notificationHint: Notification settings for check jobs can be configured in Settings → Notifications
scheduledChecks.noScheduledChecksDesc: Configure automatic repository checks to ensure data integrity
scheduledChecks.needRepository: You need to create at least one repository before scheduling checks.
